Uses of Package
me.itzloghotxd.nbt

Packages that use me.itzloghotxd.nbt
Package
Description
me.itzloghotxd.nbt
Provides the core classes and interfaces for the Named Binary Tag (NBT) library.
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Contains concrete implementations of Tag representing all currently supported Named Binary Tag (NBT) types.
  • Classes in me.itzloghotxd.nbt used by me.itzloghotxd.nbt
    Class
    Description
    Tag
    The Tag interface represents a generic Named Binary Tag (NBT) element.
    TagType
    Enumeration of all supported NBT tag types.
  • Classes in me.itzloghotxd.nbt used by me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
    Class
    Description
    AbstractTag
    An implementation of the Tag interface.
    Tag
    The Tag interface represents a generic Named Binary Tag (NBT) element.
    TagType
    Enumeration of all supported NBT tag types.
